text_block_list.text: Summer training camp. Victoire Pisa was dedicating herself to her daily training, giving it her absolute all.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Phew…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Good work. Let's head back and call it a day</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes, thank you again for today.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Umm… if it's alright with you, would you like to take a walk together? I want to feel the beautiful ocean up close. As a memory of the training camp.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Sounds good, let's go</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …—Here's one too.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Sea glass… It's lovely. The sharp shards have come to hold such a gentle light… It's just like a gemstone polished by the sea.
choice_data_list: <size=38>You're right… It's so beautiful…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes…♪ Ah, there's some over there too…

Whenever she found a lost treasure 
from the sea lying all alone—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Going out to sea all alone, traveling for a long time… 
and eventually washing up somewhere again. It's a very beautiful… and happy circle.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …It's okay, you're not lonely anymore.
With a smile like an angel, she gently gathered them up one by one.
As we continued our walk, we found ourselves in a crowded area before we knew it. Suddenly… I looked down at my feet, and there was—
choice_data_list: <size=38>(A crab. In a place like this…?)</size>

text_block_list.text: The crab was waddling along, weaving its way through the people. However, the tiny crab was hard for people to spot—
choice_data_list: <size=38>Ah! Please watch your step…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Beach Hut Customer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa… A crab!? 
…That was close, I almost stepped on it…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —Oh my… Who is this little one…?
choice_data_list: It's trying to cross here, but it looks like it might get stepped on

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I see… It's so small and all by itself, it must be feeling anxious… I wonder if it's heading home…?
choice_data_list: Would it be okay to watch over it until it reaches its destination?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes…! Yes, of course…! Please let me watch over it with you. Praying for this little one's safety—
The crab made its way through the crowd and safely reached an open space.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
It's making good progress. At this rate—… 
Oh my? Oh dear…!

Where she was looking… 
a pile of driftwood and trash blocked the crab's path.
choice_data_list: <size=38>It can't move forward like this, can it…?</size>
<size=38>It can't move forward like this, can it…?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, at this rate—… 
I'll… go connect a path for it!
choice_data_list: <size=38>I'll help too!</size>
<size=38>I'll help too!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
It's okay… Please wait right there. 
You'll be able to move forward again soon.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Little crab, this way. …That's right, one step at a time, one step at a time…
choice_data_list: <size=30>Whoa… It looks like it's being guided by your voice, Pisa</size>
<size=30>Whoa… It looks like it's being guided by your voice, Pisa</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe… My words are nothing more than a tiny push.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …Forward, forward. No matter how small the steps, as long as you move forward with hope… you will be able to return to where it's warm.
choice_data_list: <size=38>(I see…)</size>

text_block_list.text: As long as there's hope, you'll definitely reach a warm place—I believed and watched over that small figure moving forward so desperately, my prayers overlapping with its journey.
choice_data_list: <size=38>You can do it…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (Trainer… has such an earnest gaze… Looking at each tiny step so carefully, so affectionately…)
choice_data_list: <size=38>Look, Pisa! It's made so much progress!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe… Yes, it really has…!
When it arrived at a rocky area, there were several other crabs around.

The crab was welcomed back by its friends, and eventually… 
it slipped into the crevices between the rocks.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
It arrived… safely. This is where it wanted to return to… 
its precious home.
choice_data_list: Could they be its family? It looked like they were waiting for it
Could they be its family? It looked like they were waiting for it

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I think so. Hehe… Perhaps they couldn't stand the worry, thinking, 『It's late, I wonder if it's almost here』… and came to meet it.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: It's not all alone anymore. It managed to return to the circle where it feels safest… I'm truly glad.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I hope it doesn't run into any more danger…</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I hope they can… continue to live a life full of happiness.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (And I hope their circle—)
choice_data_list: <size=38>I hope their circle never breaks</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
(Ah… So that's how it's been… 
This whole time, always…)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
(Your happiness is… My joy. 
Your happiness and mine will always be together—…)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
The sunset today… is so beautiful. 
It looks so much brighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
I can see the same colored light reflected in your eyes. 
Yes, I'm sure of it—…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…Yes, just like that. Pass it through the looped part—… 
and pull it tight. That's how you weave it.
Back at the lodge, Victoire Pisa and I were making charms out of the sea glass we'd picked up and some hemp twine.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Keep going like that… weaving it so it envelops the sea glass. …—Just like this.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Hmm, I can't do it as beautifully as you, Pisa…</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: You're doing great. I can feel your desire to weave it firmly.
After being carefully taught by Victoire Pisa, finally—
choice_data_list: <size=38>I-I did it…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: You did it…! The weaves are all perfectly aligned, it's so beautiful… I'd expect no less.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe… We have matching ones now, don't we?

Since I took my time… and put my feelings into making it, 
I've completely grown attached to it.

But since we made them… 
I want to give it to her as a memento of today.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Pisa, here…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Umm, if you'd like—
『Let's exchange them』—Our warm words overlapped.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…! …Hehehe. Perhaps our hearts… 
were already one before we even put it into words—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep them connected. From now on… 
constantly, unchangingly. With our own two hands.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: And… may this bond never come undone.
